rows.label: qev055301_MSG0001
rows.name:
When you face something, or when you
are about to take action, have you
ever felt a hidden will inside you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Let's see... to rephrase it in human
terms... Would you call it "intuition"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_JNK0010
rows.name: Partially Agree

rows.label: qev055301_SEL0011
rows.name: State that you have rarely acted by relying on your intuition.

rows.label: qev055301_JNK0020
rows.name: Completely Agree

rows.label: qev055301_SEL0021
rows.name: State that your actions are always based solely on intuition.

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmm... We Orphe fundamentally
value rational behavior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0004
rows.name:
But in critical situations, we
have acted according to the
will of the Ovah within us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I see... If you were an Orphe, you
would likely be able to recognize
the will of the Ovah quite well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0006
rows.name:
I sensed the presence of Senirapa Water
deep within the Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0007
rows.name:
The Ovah is telling me... With Senirapa
Water, the Orphe can survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0008
rows.name:
I must go to the Nightglow Forest. I
would like you to assist me with that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0009
rows.name:
...I appreciate it. Now then, I
need two things for the journey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Logunie Driftwood and Sadilana Lettuce...
I need these two items for sustenance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ugh... my exhaustion is severe.
The Ovah within me is fading...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I must depart while the Ovah's
guidance is still with me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0013
rows.name:
What I need for the journey is Logunie
Driftwood and Sadilana Lettuce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0014
rows.name:
It seems you must go all the way to Arendt Bridge in
the northern Primordial Wilderness to harvest Logunie
Driftwood... I'm counting on you. Please hurry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ah, it's you... I was spacing out... The
power of the Ovah is weakening. Now, hurry
and give me the items I requested.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0016
rows.name:
I have indeed received them. I knew it
was the right choice to rely on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0017
rows.name:
I must go quickly... to
the Nightglow Forest...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_JNK0030
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev055301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask if you should tag along if necessary.

rows.label: qev055301_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if he shouldn't take a weapon with him.

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0022
rows.name:
I want to listen closely to
the voice of the Ovah. To do
that, it is best to be alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0023
rows.name:
This is enough. I want to listen closely
to the voice of the Ovah. To do that, I
do not need anything unnecessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055301_MSG0024
rows.name: Now, I set off for the Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]
